mapper.select: SELECT ITEM_ID, TICKER, ITEM_NM, MARKET FROM STOCK_ITEM ORDER BY ITEM_NM
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCK_ITEM (TICKER, ITEM_NM, MARKET, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{ticker}, #{itemNm}, #{market}, NOW())
INSERT IGNORE INTO STOCK_ITEM (TICKER, ITEM_NM, MARKET, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{srtnCd}, #{itmsNm}, #{mrktCtg}, NOW())

INSERT INTO STOCK_PRICE (ITEM_ID, OPEN_PRICE, CLOSE_PRICE, HIGH_PRICE, LOW_PRICE, VOLUME, TRADE_DATE) SELECT I.ITEM_ID, #{mkp}, #{clpr}, #{hipr}, #{lopr}, #{trqu}, STR_TO_DATE(#{basDt}, '%Y%m%d') FROM STOCK_ITEM I WHERE I.TICKER = #{srtnCd} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM STOCK_PRICE P WHERE P.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID AND P.TRADE_DATE = STR_TO_DATE(#{basDt}, '%Y%m%d') )
mapper.select: WITH MAX_DATE AS ( SELECT MAX(TRADE_DATE) AS DT FROM STOCK_PRICE ) SELECT P.OPEN_PRICE AS mkp, P.CLOSE_PRICE AS clpr, P.HIGH_PRICE AS hipr, P.LOW_PRICE AS lopr, P.VOLUME AS trqu, DATE_FORMAT(P.TRADE_DATE, '%Y%m%d') AS basDt, I.ITEM_ID AS itemId, I.TICKER AS srtnCd, I.ITEM_NM AS itmsNm, I.MARKET AS mrktCtg FROM STOCK_PRICE P JOIN STOCK_ITEM I ON P.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID JOIN MAX_DATE M ON P.TRADE_DATE = M.DT ORDER BY P.VOLUME DESC

SELECT P.OPEN_PRICE AS mkp, P.CLOSE_PRICE AS clpr, P.HIGH_PRICE AS hipr, P.LOW_PRICE AS lopr, P.VOLUME AS trqu, DATE_FORMAT(P.TRADE_DATE, '%Y%m%d') AS basDt, I.TICKER AS srtnCd, I.ITEM_NM AS itmsNm, I.MARKET AS mrktCtg FROM STOCK_PRICE P JOIN STOCK_ITEM I ON P.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID WHERE I.TICKER = #{ticker} ORDER BY P.TRADE_DATE DESC

SELECT P.OPEN_PRICE AS mkp, P.CLOSE_PRICE AS clpr, P.HIGH_PRICE AS hipr, P.LOW_PRICE AS lopr, P.VOLUME AS trqu, DATE_FORMAT(P.TRADE_DATE, '%Y%m%d') AS basDt, I.TICKER AS srtnCd, I.ITEM_NM AS itmsNm, I.MARKET AS mrktCtg FROM STOCK_PRICE P JOIN STOCK_ITEM I ON P.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID WHERE I.TICKER = #{ticker} AND P.TRADE_DATE BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y%m%d') AND STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y%m%d') ORDER BY P.TRADE_DATE ASC

SELECT I.TICKER FROM STOCK_ITEM I WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM STOCK_PRICE P WHERE P.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID AND P.TRADE_DATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y%m%d') AND P.TRADE_DATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y%m%d') )
